title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Google DeepMind tools including AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity are being used by researchers at Makerere University in Uganda to identify genetic targets for breast cancer vaccine development. The team analyzed 15,000 potential binding sites to narrow down viable targets for laboratory validation, demonstrating how these AI tools enable global research collaboration with minimal computational infrastructure.
